feed.title: SAP Community - User Experience
feed.subtitle: User Experience Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Recommendations for S/4HANA User Training Courses and Transition Feedback
entry.content:
Hello,

For those who have transitioned to S/4HANA, could you recommend a course to help instruct users on the differences between ECC and the new system?

Our goal is to prepare our users thoroughly so they are ready for the new system once the conversion is complete.

Any suggestions for courses, as well as feedback regarding the user experience during the transition, would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you,

Andrea

entry.title: Onboarding I-9 Process
entry.content:
Hello,

Our team is currently in the process of implementing ONB 2.0 and were wondering about other experiences using the I-9/Everify process in SF. If you are using it what are some of the benefits you have found? If you are not using it, how are you collecting the I-9 today, at what point in the process, and do you have an integration to another system with this information?

Thanks,

Kelly

entry.title: Issue with User Visibility in People Picker on Manage Flexible Workflow Application
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently in the process of configuring a workflow within the Manage Flexible Workflow application. However, we are encountering an issue where no users are visible in the People Picker field. Despite ensuring that all required prerequisites as per the KBA mentioned below have been met, we are still unable to see any users listed.

0002824240 - No users available in People picker of Manage workflow application

0002869055 - No users available in Manage Workflows app - SAP S/4HANA

We have followed the standard setup guidelines and checked the user assignments, but the problem persists. Could anyone from the community suggest what could be causing this issue or any troubleshooting steps we might have missed?

entry.title: Can't get the value from OData v4 entity set
entry.content:
I created a new user and retrieved data from entity set 'BANK'.  But the return value is empty even the entity set has value.

 

It can retrieved data from entity set 'ZCDS_ZTALCUSTOMER'

Another sap-all user can retrieve data from entity set 'BANK'.. 

 

So I doubt there is any authorization  is forgotten. Do you have any idea?

entry.title: Combine S-Users, P-Users from different emails into one ?
entry.content:
Good day !

Is there a way to combine different S-users, P-users from different emails into one account ?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: User Type FW is Not Active in SAP?
entry.content:
User Type FW is Not Active Error 

When we try to create a reference user or copy an existing user using SU01 t-code in SAP then we face the error message: User Type FW is not active in SAP. 

This error comes when the user you are copying is of type FW (Workflow System User), and in your system, this user type is not yet activated or supported because the workflow configuration is incomplete. 

In my case, we faced this issue specifically with user type FW but in your case the user type may be different. So it’s important to first identify your user type. 

How to Check and Activate Missing User Types using USMM T-Code.

  1. First Run the T-code USMM in the SAP GUI. 
  2. Then Click on the User Types tab. 

 

       3. Select and activate the missing user type FW or any other that's required. 

       4. Save your changes. 

Now try to create or copy the reference user again. If the error persists feel free to reach out or comment below if I can help resolve your issue I definitely will!

entry.title: User Group Calls?
entry.content:
Interested in learning if any SAP community user groups host periodic calls. Searched various places and couldn't see anywhere to sign up for calls other than separate user group-hosted groups outside of the SAP community site. Is anyone aware of SAP community groups on this site hosting periodic calls?

NOTE: I had to add tags to this post and chose the closest ones.

entry.title: What is the difference between SAP Fiori Launchpad vs SAP S/4HANA Product Home Page – My Home?
entry.content: I wold like to learn the difference in terms of context and business/user goal. Any information will be appreciated to help me learn as a newbie. Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Beyond Fiori: Elevating UX in SAP Systems to Drive Real Business Value
entry.content:
In the world of ERP, and particularly within SAP environments, UX is often discussed in terms of visual appeal and Fiori tiles. However, the true strategic value of UX goes far beyond aesthetics. It is about transforming the way users interact with complex systems, reducing friction, and unlocking measurable business impact. This post explores advanced aspects of UX in SAP, the challenges organizations face, and actionable strategies that drive real results.

UX is not just about making interfaces look good. It begins with a deep understanding of the end-to-end processes and the human context in which the system operates. Every process step carries potential for error, inefficiency, or delay. Designing for role-specific needs rather than for screens ensures that every user, from HR managers to warehouse operators, experiences an optimized workflow. Good UX directly improves KPIs by reducing errors, shortening task completion times, and increasing adoption rates across the organization.

Integrating UX with analytics creates a powerful feedback loop. Real usage data uncovers which screens waste time, where users encounter obstacles, and which processes are bypassed or executed inefficiently. Insights from these analytics allow organizations to redesign flows rather than simply polish screens, because ERP UX is fundamentally flow-driven, not pixel-driven.

Automation and intelligent design take UX to the next level. Simplifying forms, minimizing unnecessary fields, and providing context-aware recommendations reduces cognitive load and errors. Inline validations and immediate feedback improve accuracy and boost confidence in the system. These patterns turn SAP from a rigid tool into a proactive assistant for the user.

Drawing inspiration from B2B and B2C UX standards can further elevate ERP systems. Consistency across desktop, mobile, and tablet platforms ensures users experience the same intuitive interactions regardless of device. Micro-interactions and subtle feedback cues improve comprehension and engagement. Adaptive interfaces tailored to roles, departments, or geographic context make the system feel personalized without requiring extensive customization.

Finally, UX success in SAP is as much about culture as it is about design. Executive support is critical to challenge entrenched workflows and encourage adoption of improved practices. Collaboration between IT and business units ensures that UX improvements are meaningful and strategic rather than cosmetic. Investment in user training, combined with iterative design informed by real-world data, creates a sustainable UX-driven culture that delivers measurable business outcomes.

Elevating UX in SAP is not a one-time project; it is a continuous journey that blends design thinking, process insight, analytics, and cultural alignment. When executed thoughtfully, it transforms SAP from a functional system into a strategic enabler, enhancing efficiency, accuracy, and overall business performance.

entry.title: Why do many power users still prefer SAP GUI over Fiori in S/4HANA?
entry.content:
SAP learner here 👋

As I dig deeper into S/4HANA UX, I keep running into a pattern: even in organizations with a well-set-up Fiori Launchpad, a lot of experienced users still default to SAP GUI. I’m not trying to start a GUI vs. Fiori war—genuinely curious about the practical reasons behind this and what has worked to shift habits

I am looking answers for the following topics: 

  • A concrete task where GUI wins (e.g., “Display/Change X,” “High-volume posting,” “Mass edits”).

  • Why Fiori fell short (speed? feature gap? layout? navigation?)

  • Workarounds or fixes you’ve tried

  • If you’ve successfully moved teams to Fiori, what made the real difference? 

  • Which roles experience the biggest benefits with a switch from GUI to FIORI? Which Roles generally prefer to stay in GUI?

entry.title: Disable horizontal scroll bar at the intro section performance forms - succssfactors
entry.content:
Hi dears, 

My performance forms in succssfactos appear with a horizontal scroll bar in the introductory sections.

The bar appears even with small text.

How do I disable this feature?

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud 2508 / Error during Upload of Pages
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
i have the following issue when trying to upload pages in a new starter customizing tenant.
What i wanted to do, was export custom pages from a different tenant which is part of internal system environment and import them in a new starter customizing tenant for workshops.
The system tells me that the pages cant be uploaded and this is the error message:

I think the issue is, that the system i downloaded the pages from, has german as its original language and the starter customizing system usually have english as the original language. 

My question is, can i do anything to solve this ? I tried changing some language keys from "DE" to "EN" in the json file that is imported, but this only results in the same error but with the translation "English(EN)" instead of "German(DE)" (compare screenshot).
Where can i even check what the original language of the tenant is ?

Best regards 
Lukas

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud 2508 / Missing standard value in a custom user role
entry.content:
Hello experts, 
i have the following issue. I created  a user role for a finance user and now the user reports that he cant define a standard value for the "calculate tax" checkbox, which is used in apps like "create supplier invoice". 

In addition to the finance catalogs the role has the catalogs from the standard SAP-Role BR_EMPLOYEE, especially the catalog for the user standardvalues (SAP_CA_BC_USER_PARAM_PC).
My question is, what am i missing ? Is there a setting or app to control these standardvalues ? Or is it only depended on the business catalogs and if so, how can i find out which catalog im missing ?

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: Translation issue in spanish for description of App F2661 - Find maintenance task list and operation
entry.content: Hello all... I found an issue with the description of the App F2661 in Spanish. It appears as: "Bucar operación y lista de tareas de actualización". It should be: "Buscar..." (Buscar instead of Bucar). When you search the App by the description you cannot find it because the translation error. Please help us to solve the issue. Trank you.

entry.title: Check Box vs. Switch
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a general question regarding when to use a Check Box versus a Switch. According to the Fiori guidelines:

Don’t use a switch if: It’s unclear whether the control represents a state or an action. In such cases, use a checkbox instead.

The scenario I’m dealing with is a Settings panel that contains multiple options users can turn on or off. For certain settings (e.g., Translation, Loading Indicator), enabling the option immediately displays additional content in the UI. In these cases, I believe a Switch is appropriate because the change has an instant impact on the interface.

However, for other settings, enabling them does not produce any immediate UI change; the effect only becomes visible when the user navigates to another module. This raises the question:

Should we use a mix of Checkboxes and Switches based on behavior, or is there a way to unify the design by using a single control type to keep the UI consistent and clean?

Attached is the screenshot of the mockup that I'm currently working on. You can download to review. Thank you!

entry.title: AMEX Expense Itemizations
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I need your support, maybe one of you have a similar case as mine.

I have processed several expense reports which include invoices that have expenses using the credit card AMEX.

The AMEX expenses appear automaticaly in CONCUR as available expenses and it is necessary to include them into a new expenses report.

My issue starts when I need to report these expenses due to I receive just one invoice for several AMEX expenses and I don't have the way to itemize the only invoice that I have available to add the AMEX expenses as itemizations.

I mean I cannot itemize an invoice adding expenses performed with AMEX card.

What I have done is to let these AMEX expenses as personal expenses.

Does anyone know if there is any way to itemize an invoice adding AMEX expenses as itemizations?

I will appreciate so much the support.

Thanks a lot in advance.

entry.title: Roadmap Inquiry: UI5 Table Grouping Expand/Collapse for OData V4
entry.content:
Hi,
Our SBN team has encountered an issue during the development of the table group function for the catalog. The data volume of our catalog table will be extremely large, and we need to group the data by customer. However, there is currently no available control to support this functionality.
 
We would like to inquire: When does our UI5 control library plan to support the expand/collapse functionality for grouping?
 
The Analytical Table can fulfill the requirement, but it does not support OData V4. We will not revert to the older OData V2 protocol just to compensate for this missing frontend feature.
Meanwhile, the Tree Table is not suitable for our use case.
As a result, we currently do not have an appropriate control to support expand and collapse for group functionality.
 
The Fiori Elements Framework ALV supports the latest OData V4, but migrating to this solution involves cost.
Therefore, we would like to know if there is an upgrade roadmap for the UI5 Table group expand/collapse function.
 
Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud 2602 / Navigation from Notifications to My Inbox - Expert view
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
i have a question about the following topic. The users in our system should use the App My Inbox to access their open Tasks that they recieve from workflows. Because of custom attributes we wanted to display in the Inbox, we decided that all users should use the App My Inbox in the Expert Mode. 
The problem is, that if a user gets a notification for an open task on his homepage and then clicks on the bell and then on the task, the Task gets opened in the "normal" My Inbox App. 
My question is, are we able to change the App that opens when you click on a notfication from the normal Inbox to the Inbox in the expert mode ? And if so how ?

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: A customer requested to downgrade some set of users from Advanced users to Core users.
entry.content:
A customer requested to downgrade some set of users from Advanced users to Core users. And this request is coming from SAP S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition. I know in Private cloud you will use USMM/SLAW tool, in Public cloud, I know it is SAP that manages it. But I need guidance on how to go about it (downgrade users). 

Scenario 2: In my research, I discovered I have to remove app/tiles (associated catalogs) from a user. The user has 120 apps, is there a tool to know which Fiori apps makes a user Advanced user, as it is tedious work to remove and check over and over again if user has changed to Core user.

Regards,

Benjamin.

entry.title: Trouble creating a ufl for crystal reports 2025.
entry.content:
Having trouble creating a user function library for crystal 2025   I cannot see the new ufl in crystal.

Using visual studio community 2022.

I did the following

1. created a project called "CRUFLmyFunctions

2.  added a class  MyFunctions.vb

3.  Created a "HelloWorld" function that returns a string

4. Compiled for x64

5.  Set COM Visible = true

6.  Signed the assembly by creating a new strong name key file

7. copied file to crystal library folder  (CRUFLMyFunctions.dll)

8.  Registered file with gacutil -ir   (shows as successful)

9  Registered file using c:\windows\microsoft.net\Framework64\v4.0.30319\regasm  (shows as successful)

10  Open crystal reports 2025 and go to create a new formula.  But the UFL does not show.   What am  I missing?
